name: overview_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW overview_view AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_label, Status_Analysis.churn_category, Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.senior_citizen FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Customer_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;

name: exploration_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW exploration_view AS SELECT Customer_Info.age, Status_Analysis.churn_label, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Customer_Info.number_of_dependents FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Customer_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;

name: detail_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW detail_view AS SELECT Status_Analysis.cltv, Service_Options.contract, Payment_Info.monthly_charges, Status_Analysis.churn_score FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Service_Options ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Service_Options.customer_id JOIN Payment_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id;
